stages.precondition: Box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end effectors are free.
stages.postcondition: Box_1 is grasped by both end effectors.

pre_validation.reason: The red box is on top of the green box, but the left end effector is in contact with the red box so both end effectors are not free.

stages.precondition: box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end-effectors are free.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped by both the left and right end-effectors.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is on top of the green box (box_2), but the left end-effector is in contact with box_1, so both end-effectors are not free.

stages.precondition: Box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end-effectors are free.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is stacked on top of the green box (box_2), and both end-effectors appear not to be grasping any object.

post_validation.reason: Only the left end-effector is in contact with the red box (box_1); the right end-effector is not grasping it.

cycles.outcome: cycle_error: Maximum number of replans exceeded (2).
